title: T-011 — Spare parts Server Actions (consume/adjust/reorder/receipt) per V-MNT-18..20
prompt:
# T-011 — Spare parts mutation Server Actions

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §11.5 (V-MNT-18..20), §9.10, §9.11
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement 4 Server Actions: `consumeSparePart` (mwo-linked), `adjustSparePart` (cycle-count/damage with >10% approval gate), `reorderSparePart` (creates internal purchase request — D365 push P2), `receiveSparePart` (receipt txn). Enforces V-MNT-18 (consume requires mwo_id), V-MNT-19 (cannot exceed qty_on_hand, row-locked txn), V-MNT-20 (reorder alert on qty<=reorder_point).

## Pre-flight
Verify T-001 perms, T-005 spares tables, T-004 mwo table, Wave1 T-111 outbox primitive.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/spare-parts.ts` — 4 Server Actions; each uses `db.transaction()` with `SELECT … FOR UPDATE` on `spare_parts_stock` row.
2. consumeSparePart: V-MNT-18 mwo_id NOT NULL guard → error `SPARE_CONSUME_REQUIRES_MWO`; V-MNT-19 qty<=qty_on_hand → error `SPARE_INSUFFICIENT_STOCK`; inserts spare_parts_transactions(txn_type='consume') + decrements stock + writes outbox `spare_parts.consumed`.
3. adjustSparePart: if |new-old|/old > 0.10 → flag `requires_approval=true` (manager second-step required); RBAC mnt.spare.adjust; inserts spare_parts_transactions(txn_type='adjust', delta=new-old).
4. reorderSparePart: inserts notification_events (warn) + outbox `spare_parts.reorder_requested` with `bl_maint_07_note='P2 D365 PO integration deferred'`.
5. receiveSparePart: txn_type='receipt'; increments stock; outbox `spare_parts.received`.
6. Zod input schemas. Vitest with Testcontainers: V-MNT-18 mwo_id required; V-MNT-19 over-consume rejected; concurrent consume serialised by FOR UPDATE; >10% adjust returns requires_approval=true.

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/spare-parts.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/spare-parts.schema.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/__tests__/spare-parts.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given consumeSparePart with mwo_id=NULL, when called, then fails with code `SPARE_CONSUME_REQUIRES_MWO` (V-MNT-18).
2. Given spare_parts_stock.qty_on_hand=5 and consumeSparePart(qty=10), when called, then fails with code `SPARE_INSUFFICIENT_STOCK` (V-MNT-19) and stock is unchanged.
3. Given two concurrent consume(qty=3) on the same stock row qty_on_hand=5, when both are issued, then exactly one succeeds and one fails INSUFFICIENT_STOCK; final qty_on_hand=2.
4. Given adjustSparePart with old=100, new=85 (15% delta), when called, then result.requires_approval=true and txn row is inserted with requires_approval flag; second-step approval Server Action call (mnt.spare.adjust manager) flips the flag.
5. Given reorderSparePart called, when settled, then a notification_events row + outbox `spare_parts.reorder_requested` row exist (D365 push deferred per BL-MAINT-07).

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest asserting all five ACs with Testcontainers.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/__tests__/spare-parts.test.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip `SELECT … FOR UPDATE` — V-MNT-19 concurrent consume race must be serialised.
- Do not write to D365 — BL-MAINT-07 P2.
- Do not allow consume without mwo_id (V-MNT-18 critical audit trail).
- Do not allow consume causing qty_on_hand<0 (CHECK + V-MNT-19 cooperate).
- Do not bypass RBAC mnt.spare.* perms.

pipeline_inputs.description: 4 Server Actions for spare parts mutations with V-MNT-18/19/20 guards + >10% adjust approval gate + outbox events.
pipeline_inputs.details: Concurrent consume serialised by FOR UPDATE. Adjust >10% requires manager second-step. Reorder is internal notification only in P1 (BL-MAINT-07).
out_of_scope: Reorder cron alert (T-009 owns daily scan)

Given two concurrent consume(qty=3) on qty_on_hand=5 with SELECT FOR UPDATE, when both issued, then exactly one succeeds and final qty=2 (race serialized)
Given adjustSparePart 100→85 (15%), when called, then requires_approval=true; manager second-step flips flag
Given reorderSparePart called, when settled, then notification_events row + outbox spare_parts.reorder_requested exist (no D365 push per BL-MAINT-07)
